description_long: This rifle features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly black finish and a compact, stocky build. It has a fixed stock at the rear, a prominent detachable box magazine beneath the receiver, and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control. The upper receiver is equipped with a rail system, and there is a simple iron sight mounted on top. The barrel is short and thick, suggesting a heavy or bull barrel type, and the muzzle appears to lack any additional device. The overall construction is angular and modern, with metallic and polymer components visible throughout.
description: A compact, tactical black rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, vertical foregrip, and iron sights.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the barrel end and the vertical foregrip directly beneath it.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the fixed stock, detachable box magazine, vertical foregrip, and iron sight on the rail.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the stock and the alignment of the receiver, with the magazine and foregrip visible below.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the fixed stock, magazine, foregrip, and upper rail with iron sight.
